data.description:

Dynam Japan Holdings Co ( (HK:6889) ) has shared an update.

Dynam Japan Holdings has set the record date for shareholder eligibility to attend and vote at its 2026 annual general meeting, which is scheduled for Thursday, 25 June 2026. Shareholders whose names appear on the company’s share register at the close of business on Friday, 22 May 2026, will be entitled to participate in the meeting.

The company also outlined procedures for investors who have yet to register their shareholdings, requiring properly completed and stamped transfer forms with accompanying share certificates to reach the Hong Kong share registrar by 4:30 p.m. on 22 May 2026. The announcement clarifies the timetable and administrative steps for voting rights, helping investors secure governance participation well ahead of the 2026 meeting.

More about Dynam Japan Holdings Co

Dynam Japan Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Japan-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 06889. The company operates within the gaming and entertainment sector, focusing on the management of pachinko and related amusement venues, serving customers primarily in the Japanese leisure market.

Shui On Land ( (HK:0272) ) just unveiled an update.

Shui On Land Limited has convened its Annual General Meeting for 27 May 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will be asked to receive and adopt the audited financial statements and reports for the year ended 31 December 2025. The meeting will also consider the re-election of four directors, the authorization of directors’ remuneration, the re-appointment of the external auditor, and a broad mandate empowering the board to issue new shares and dispose of treasury shares within specified limits.

The proposed general mandate to allot, issue, and deal with additional shares, as well as to sell or transfer treasury shares, would give the board greater flexibility in future capital management and potential fundraising. This authorization, alongside the routine renewal of board and auditor mandates, underscores standard corporate governance practices and could influence Shui On Land’s capacity to respond quickly to market opportunities and financing needs, affecting both capital structure and shareholder dilution over the mandate period.

More about Shui On Land

Shui On Land Limited is a Hong Kong–listed property developer incorporated in the Cayman Islands. The company operates in the real estate sector, focusing on the development, ownership, and management of property projects in mainland China and Hong Kong, and is overseen by a board that includes both executive and independent non-executive directors.

The latest announcement is out from BAIOO Family Interactive ( (HK:2100) ).

BAIOO Family Interactive announced that its chairman and executive director, Mr. Dai Jian, has increased his shareholding in the company through his indirectly owned vehicle, Stmoritz Investment Limited. Following a series of on-market purchases culminating on 22 April 2026, Stmoritz now holds about 691.4 million shares, representing roughly 24.1% of the company’s issued share capital.

The latest transaction involved the purchase of 166,000 shares at an average price of HK$0.504 per share, bringing Mr. Dai’s total acquisitions between 30 March and 22 April 2026 to 3,444,000 shares. data.title: CGN Mining Posts Solid Q1 2026 Uranium Output and Active Trading Position
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CGN Mining Co ( (HK:1164) ) just unveiled an update.

CGN Mining reported that uranium deposits in which it holds interests produced 580.9 tonnes of uranium in the first quarter of 2026, achieving 97.1% of the quarterly production plan. Output was led by its 49%-owned Kazakhstan associate Ortalyk at 426.4 tonnes, while Semizbay-U produced 154.5 tonnes, with a sulfuric acid shortage temporarily weighing on the Semizbay mine but not expected to affect full-year production.

On the trading side, the group held 967 tonnes of uranium inventory at the end of March 2026 at an average cost of US$80.60 per pound U3O8, alongside contracted but undelivered sales of 2,519 tonnes at an average price of US$89.20 per pound. New contracts and settlements in the quarter show active two-way trading, suggesting stable demand and pricing for its uranium portfolio, while management cautioned that the unaudited figures may fluctuate with market and operational conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1164) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.67 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CGN Mining Co stock, see the HK:1164 Stock Forecast page.

More about CGN Mining Co

CGN Mining Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed uranium producer and trader incorporated in the Cayman Islands, with core operations focused on natural uranium assets in Kazakhstan. The group holds minority interests in Semizbay-U LLP and Mining Company Ortalyk LLP, supporting its role in the global nuclear fuel supply chain through upstream production and physical uranium trading.

data.title: Giordano lifts Q1 revenue on retail and online gains despite GCC and wholesale drag
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Giordano International ( (HK:0709) ) has shared an update.

Giordano International reported a 3.9% year-on-year increase in group revenue to HK$1.04 billion for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, driven by a 7.4% rise in retail revenue and an 8.2% gain in same-store sales, despite a net reduction in store count. Growth was led by Greater China, where revenue climbed 7.8% on recovering demand in Hong Kong and Taiwan and strong online sales in Mainland China, and by Southeast Asia, where Singapore and Thailand outperformed.

Online revenue surged 40.5% across most markets, underscoring the group’s strategic emphasis on digitalisation under its five-year “Beyond Boundaries” plan, including planned upgrades to web and app interfaces to enhance the customer journey. This strength offset a 19.1% decline in wholesale revenue linked to inventory right-sizing at the South Korean joint venture and streamlining of Mainland China franchise operations, as well as a 5.2% revenue drop in the GCC due to weaker sentiment from regional tensions, with underlying growth stronger when excluding that drag.

More about Giordano International

Giordano International Limited is a Hong Kong-listed apparel retailer focused on casual wear, operating a network of stores and online channels across Greater China, Southeast Asia, Australia, and the Gulf Cooperation Council markets. The group sells its products through a mix of self-operated retail outlets, e-commerce platforms, and wholesale arrangements with overseas and Mainland China franchisees, aiming to expand its global brand presence.

Wing On Co. International Ltd. ( (HK:0289) ) has shared an announcement.

Wing On Company International Limited has convened its thirty-fifth annual general meeting for 15 June 2026 in Hong Kong, with a contingency date set for 26 June 2026 in case of severe weather or extreme conditions. Shareholders will review the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025, consider a final dividend, re-elect three directors, set director fees and a maximum board size of 12, and confirm the re-appointment of KPMG as auditor.

The meeting will also ask shareholders to approve a general mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20 per cent of the company’s existing share capital and a share buy-back mandate of up to 10 per cent, both within a defined period until the next AGM or earlier revocation. data.title: Elegance Optical Faces Ongoing Trading Suspension After HKEX Review
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Elegance Optical International Holdings Limited ( (HK:0907) ) has provided an update.

Elegance Optical International Holdings Limited has been informed that the Listing Review Committee of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange has upheld an earlier decision to suspend trading in its shares, citing the company’s failure to maintain sufficient operations and assets to justify continued listing. The committee found that Elegance Optical’s recently revived eyewear business lacks a proven, coherent plan and sustainable track record, and that its new liquor trading venture is thin on signed contracts, overly reliant on a part-time consultant and unsupported by robust financial data, leaving the company’s asset base and financial position too weak to meet listing requirements.

In its review, the committee highlighted inconsistencies in Elegance Optical’s business model disclosures, questioned the viability of its profit forecasts, and noted that a key shareholder loan was not on normal commercial terms, underscoring concerns over the company’s financial health. As a result, the regulator concluded that, as of the February hearing, Elegance Optical had not demonstrated sufficient operational substance or asset value, prompting the continuation of the trading suspension and signalling heightened risk and uncertainty for shareholders and potential investors.

More about Elegance Optical International Holdings Limited

Elegance Optical International Holdings Limited, incorporated in Bermuda and listed in Hong Kong, historically operates in the eyewear sector and has recently re-focused on its eyewear business while also venturing into a liquor trading business. The company has sought to adopt an asset-light and branded model in eyewear and to build a new revenue stream through liquor trading, but both lines remain at an early stage with limited track record and unclear long-term sustainability.

Jiangsu Expressway has approved a further cash capital injection of RMB128.18 million into its subsidiary Jiangsu Danjin Expressway Co., which is responsible for the Danyang to Jintan section of the Fuli Expressway project. Selected construction contractors for the Danjin project will also join as social capital contributors with RMB458.69 million, lifting Danjin’s registered capital by RMB586.86 million to RMB5.83 billion and slightly diluting Jiangsu Expressway’s stake but strengthening the project’s funding base.

The move underscores Jiangsu Expressway’s continued build-out of its toll road portfolio and signals steady progress on a key regional corridor, with implications for long-term traffic growth, earnings contribution, and alignment with local transport development plans.

data.title: FS.COM Downplays Financial Impact of Huawei Trademark Lawsuit
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

FS.COM Limited Class H ( (HK:3355) ) has provided an announcement.

FS.COM Limited has disclosed that it has been served with a civil statement of claim by Huawei Technologies, which alleges that the company has infringed Huawei’s trademark rights and seeks an injunction against further infringement as well as compensation. FS.COM is contesting the allegations, stating that its products do not infringe Huawei’s trademarks and noting that sales of the referenced products contributed less than 0.2% of its 2025 operating revenue.

The company is assessing the case, has engaged legal counsel, and is in active communication with Huawei, while emphasizing that the litigation remains at an early stage. The board said the proceedings have no material adverse impact on the group’s normal operations, financial position, or existing business at present, and pledged to update investors should there be any significant developments in the dispute.

More about FS.COM Limited Class H

FS.COM Limited is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong. The group provides products and services in the communications and technology sector, with a diversified portfolio such that the disputed product line represents only a small fraction of its overall operating revenue.

data.title: Simcere Withdraws and Plans to Resubmit NDA for Atopic Dermatitis Drug Rademikibart
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Simcere Pharmaceutical Group Limited ( (HK:2096) ) has provided an update.

Simcere Pharmaceutical Group has voluntarily withdrawn and plans to promptly resubmit its New Drug Application in China for rademikibart, an innovative IL-4Rα-targeting monoclonal antibody for atopic dermatitis co-developed with Connect Biopharma, as part of a strategic optimization of its commercialization plan. Phase 3 data showed rapid onset and strong long-term efficacy, with EASI-75, EASI-90 and IGA 0/1 response rates climbing to 96.6%, 85.3% and 87.1% by week 52, underscoring the drug’s potential to strengthen Simcere’s position in the competitive inflammatory and autoimmune therapeutics market and support its broader innovation-led growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2096) stock is a Buy with a HK$16.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Simcere Pharmaceutical Group Limited stock, see the HK:2096 Stock Forecast page.

More about Simcere Pharmaceutical Group Limited

Simcere Pharmaceutical Group Limited is an innovation- and R&D-driven pharmaceutical company that has established a State Key Laboratory of Neurology and Oncology Drug Development. It focuses on therapeutic areas including neuroscience, oncology, autoimmune diseases and anti-infective treatments, targeting future high clinical-need indications through in-house research and strategic collaborations with innovative companies and institutes.

data.title: Transcenta Reports Strong Preclinical Results for LIV1-Targeting ADCs in Breast and Prostate Cancers
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Transcenta Holding Limited ( (HK:6628) ) has provided an update.

Transcenta Holding Limited has reported new preclinical data for its novel LIV1-targeting antibody-drug conjugate program TST013, including ADC-2 and ADC-3, showing strong anti-tumor activity and favorable tolerability in multiple patient-derived xenograft models. The findings, presented at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting, underscore differentiated payload-dependent efficacy, with ADC-2 demonstrating robust effects in ER-positive/HER2-negative breast and NSCLC models and ADC-3 achieving sustained tumor suppression in LIV1-high prostate cancer.

The data, alongside earlier results in triple-negative breast cancer, strengthen Transcenta’s case for advancing its LIV1-targeting ADCs into further development for a broad range of LIV1-positive solid tumors. Demonstrated in vivo stability, an extended half-life versus a benchmark analog and a defined maximum tolerated dose for ADC-2 in mice highlight a potentially competitive profile that could enhance the company’s positioning in the emerging ADC oncology segment, while underscoring both the promise and remaining development risks for investors and clinical stakeholders.

More about Transcenta Holding Limited

Transcenta Holding Limited is a biotech company focused on developing antibody-drug conjugates and other biologic therapies targeting solid tumors. Leveraging proprietary antibody platforms and site-specific conjugation technologies, the company is advancing candidates aimed at breast, prostate and lung cancers, with a particular focus on LIV1-positive tumor types.
